title: SimulationConfig
description: Configuration schema for a GalvanicCorrosionEngine simulation.

anode.description: The anode (less noble) material in the galvanic pair.

cathode.description: The cathode (more noble) material in the galvanic pair.

environment.description: Static atmospheric conditions used when no weather provider is configured.

weather.description: Optional time-varying weather provider. Omit or set type to 'none' for a static simulation.

material.description: A material specification. Supply only 'name' for a registry lookup, or all fields for a custom material.

name.description: Material name. Used for registry lookup (e.g. 'Zinc', 'Mild Steel', 'Aluminium', 'Copper', 'Nickel', 'Magnesium') or as the display name for a custom material.

standardPotential.description: Standard electrochemical potential in V vs. SHE. Required for custom materials.

exchangeCurrentDensity.description: Exchange current density in A/m². Required for custom materials.

molarMass.description: Molar mass in kg/mol. Required for custom materials.

electronsTransferred.description: Electrons transferred per formula unit in anodic dissolution. Required for custom materials.

density.description: Density in kg/m³. Required for custom materials.

relativeHumidity.description: Relative humidity as a fraction in [0, 1].

baseTempCelsius.description: Daily-mean temperature in °C. Used when type is 'synthetic'.

tempAmplitude.description: Half-range of diurnal temperature swing in °C. Used when type is 'synthetic'.

baseRelativeHumidity.description: Daily-mean relative humidity as a fraction [0, 1]. Used when type is 'synthetic'.

humidityAmplitude.description: Half-range of diurnal humidity swing. Used when type is 'synthetic'.

chlorideConcentration.description: Chloride concentration in mol/L. Used when type is 'synthetic'.

precipitation.description: Constant precipitation rate in mm/h. Used when type is 'synthetic'.

windSpeed.description: Constant wind speed in m/s. Used when type is 'synthetic'.

csvPath.description: Path to the CSV weather data file. Required when type is 'csv'.
